targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time AS "time",
  usage_kwh
FROM main_data.energy_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND load_type IN (${load_type:sqlstring})
ORDER BY time

SELECT 
  'Ham Veri' as servis,
  MAX(time) as son_kayit
FROM main_data.energy_readings
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Ä°ÅlenmiÅ Veri', MAX(time)
FROM main_data.processed_readings
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Anomali', MAX(detected_at)
FROM main_data.anomalies
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Maliyet', MAX(time)
FROM main_data.cost_analysis

SELECT ROUND(SUM(cost_tl)::numeric, 2) as bugunun_maliyeti
FROM main_data.cost_analysis
WHERE time >= CURRENT_DATE

SELECT load_type, COUNT(*) as adet
FROM main_data.processed_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY load_type

SELECT usage_kwh
FROM main_data.energy_readings
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(time)))::int as gecikme
FROM main_data.processed_readings

SELECT COUNT(*) as anomali_sayisi
FROM main_data.anomalies
WHERE time >= CURRENT_DATE
